source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Superheated vapor ammonia enters an insulated nozzle at 30\circ\text{C}, 1000 kPa with a low velocity and at a rate of 0.01 kg/s. The ammonia exits at 300 kPa with a velocity of 450 m/s. Determine the temperature (or quality, if saturated) of the nozzle?
